reviews.comment:
Vengo por la avenida y al no haber fila entro y me pongo como dice el cartel para cargar y el playero muy maleducado me pide que de toda la vuelta a la manzana y entre si o si por la calle lateral una locuara me fui a la puma de la otra cuadra y me atendieton de 10 no vuelvo mas a esa estasion

(Translated by Google)
I come down the avenue and since there is no line I get in and stand as the sign says to load and the very rude beach attendant asks me to go all the way around the block and get in by the side street. A crazy woman. I went to the Puma on the other block and they served me perfectly. I will never return to that station again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8983193634567568949/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoak5qcVVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre fué , mi estación de servicio , pero x 2 años seguidos , alguien del lugar robó 9mil puntos que acumulé a lo largo del año

(Translated by Google)
It was always my gas station, but for two years in a row, someone there stole 9,000 points that I had accumulated throughout the year.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8983193634567568949/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocFBLZzBnRRAB
